title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules for effectively prompting Claude Code by studying how Anthropic engineers use it: prompt skills rather than Claude directly, recognize skills as more than prompts, build composable skills instead of custom ones, and expect skills to improve over sessions. The video argues most users are approaching this incorrectly.
